What is the modern historians' view of the artist's later works?
options: They agree with contemporary critics that the works lacked any coherent structure.
They believe the works were revolutionary, despite their seemingly disorganized appearance.
They argue that the artist made a mistake by ignoring the advice of contemporary critics.
They suggest that the chaotic nature of the paintings was entirely accidental.
correct_answer: They believe the works were revolutionary, despite their seemingly disorganized appearance.
explanation: Ushbu savol inversiyali shart gap ('Had the critics looked...') va murakkab gap tuzilishini tushunishni baholaydi. To'g'ri javob matndagi 'groundbreaking' (inqilobiy) va 'apparent mess' (tartibsiz bo'lib ko'ringan) tushunchalarini qayta ifodalaydi.

question_text: By the time the manager arrived at the office, the staff _______ the report for over three hours.
explanation: O'tmishda sodir bo'lgan ikki voqeadan oldinroq boshlanib, davom etgan harakatni ifodalash uchun 'Past Perfect Continuous' zamoni ishlatiladi.

question_text: If I _______ about the sudden change in the flight schedule, I would have made alternative arrangements.
explanation: Bu 3-shart gap (Third Conditional) bo'lib, o'tmishdagi afsus yoki amalga oshmagan vaziyatni anglatadi; 'if' qismida 'Past Perfect' ishlatiladi.

question_text: The detective asked the suspect where _______ the previous night.
explanation: O'zlashtirma gapda (reported speech) gap tartibi to'g'ri bo'lishi va zamon ketma-ketligi (sequence of tenses) saqlanishi kerak.

question_text: Although _______ exhausted after the long journey, they decided to go out for dinner immediately.
explanation: Murakkab ergash gapda 'although' bog'lovchisidan keyin to'liq ega va kesimli gap qatnashishi kerak.

question_text: It was a difficult situation, but she managed to _______ the bullet and tell him the truth.
explanation: 'Bite the bullet' iborasi yoqimsiz bo'lsa-da, muqarrar bo'lgan ishni jasorat bilan bajarishni anglatadi.

question_text: Hardly _______ finished his presentation when the audience started asking challenging questions.
explanation: 'Hardly' so'zi gap boshida kelganda, inversiya qoidasiga ko'ra yordamchi fe'l egadan oldin qo'yiladi.

question_text: Had the company invested in new technology earlier, they ______ to compete with the market leaders last year.
explanation: Bu 3-shart gapning (Third Conditional) invertirlashgan shakli bo'lib, o'tmishdagi amalga oshmagan ish-harakatning natijasini bildiradi. Asosiy qismda 'would have + V3' (would have been able) qo'llanilishi shart.

question_text: By the time the board of directors arrived at the conference room, the crucial documents ______.
explanation: O'tmishdagi ma'lum bir vaqt yoki harakatdan oldin sodir bo'lib ulgurgan ish-harakatni bildirish uchun Past Perfect Passive (had already been signed) zamoni ishlatiladi.

question_text: The manager insisted that the marketing strategy ______ revised immediately to avoid further losses.
explanation: 'Insist', 'demand', 'suggest' kabi fe'llardan keyingi ergash gaplarda Subjunctive (so'roq-istak mayili) qo'llaniladi va fe'lning boshlang'ich shakli (infinitiv 'to' siz — be) ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the most appropriate collocation to complete the sentence: 'Despite facing numerous setbacks, the young entrepreneur refused to _________ and eventually built a successful enterprise.'
explanation: 'Throw in the towel' iborasi ingliz tilida taslim bo'lish yoki kurashni to'xtatish ma'nosini bildiradi va B2 darajasidagi eng ko'p ishlatiladigan idiomali kollokatsiyalardan biridir.

question_text: Select the synonym for the underlined word in the given context: 'The scientist's groundbreaking research provided a *lucrative* opportunity for the pharmaceutical company to expand its market.'
explanation: 'Lucrative' so'zi katta foyda keltiradigan, daromadli degan ma'noni anglatadi va 'profitable' uning to'g'ridan-to'g'ri sinonimidir.

question_text: Which phrasal verb best fits the sentence? 'Due to unexpected budget cuts, the management had to _________ the plans for the new office building.'
explanation: 'Call off' fe'li biror rejalashtirilgan tadbir yoki loyihani bekor qilish ma'nosini bildiradi, bu B2 darajasidagi muhim leksik birlik hisoblanadi.

question_text: Choose the correct word to complete the academic sentence: 'The museum curator carefully examined the ancient artifact to _________ its exact historical origin.'
explanation: 'Ascertain' fe'li rasmiy tilda biror narsani aniqlash, uning haqiqatiga ishonch hosil qilish ma'nosida ishlatiladi.

question_text: Select the adjective that correctly collocates with the noun: 'The professor delivered a _________ lecture that left many students deep in thought about the nature of consciousness.'
explanation: 'Profound lecture' (chuqur ma'noli, ta'sirli ma'ruza) B2-C1 darajasidagi tabiiy kollokatsiya bo'lib, abstrakt mavzularga nisbatan ishlatiladi.

question_text: Choose the word that accurately replaces the capitalized word: 'Her IMPARTIAL judgment in the dispute ensured that both parties felt heard and treated fairly.'
explanation: 'Impartial' so'zi xolis, tarafkash bo'lmagan ma'nosini anglatadi, 'unbiased' esa uning eng yaqin sinonimidir.

question_text: Despite the heavy rain, the event went ahead as planned and turned out to be a huge _____.
explanation: Bu yerda to'g'ri kollokatsiya 'huge triumph' (katta g'alaba/muvaffaqiyat) birikmasidir, garchi 'success' ham ma'no jihatdan to'g'ri tuyulsa-da, aynan shu kontekst va kuchli ijobiy bo'yoqdorlik uchun 'triumph' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Could you please _____ me up to date with the latest developments in the project?
explanation: 'To bring someone up to date' — ma'lumotni yangilash, so'nggi o'zgarishlardan xabardor qilish degan ma'noni bildiruvchi barqaror idiomatik birikma.

question_text: The company decided to _____ down its operations in the region due to a significant drop in demand.
explanation: 'To scale down' — faoliyat hajmini yoki miqdorini qisqartirish, kichraytirish ma'nosini beruvchi phrasal verb.

question_text: His innovative ideas played a _____ role in the successful completion of the marketing campaign.
explanation: 'Pivotal role' — hal qiluvchi, o'ta muhim rol degan ma'noni anglatuvchi B2 darajasidagi eng ko'p ishlatiladigan akademik kollokatsiyalardan biri.

question_text: Local authorities are taking measures to _____ the negative impact of tourism on the historical city center.
explanation: 'To mitigate' fe'li salbiy ta'sir, zarar yoki oqibatlarni yumshatish, kamaytirish ma'nosida rasmiy va akademik tilda keng qo'llaniladi.

question_text: The politician's vague response failed to _____ any confidence among the voters.
explanation: 'To inspire confidence' — ishonch uyg'otmoq, ilhomlantirmoq ma'nosini beruvchi mustahkam inglizcha kollokatsiya hisoblanadi.

question_text: Despite her initial hesitation, she finally decided to ________ the challenge and applied for the senior manager position.
explanation: "Take up a challenge" — yangi qiyinchilik yoki ishni qabul qilish, boshlash ma'nosini bildiruvchi B2 darajasidagi barqaror birikma (kollokatsiya).

question_text: The company's innovative marketing strategy gave them a significant ________ over their main competitors in the global market.
explanation: "Give someone an edge" — raqobatchilardan ustunlik yoki ustun kelish imkoniyatini bermoq ma'nosini anglatuvchi keng tarqalgan B2 darajasidagi ibora.

question_text: Could you please ________ me in on the details of the new project? I missed yesterday's briefing.
explanation: "Fill someone in" — kimnidir yetishmayotgan ma'lumotlar yoki so'nggi yangiliklar bilan tanishtirmoq, xabardor qilmoq ma'nosini beruvchi frazeologik fe'l.

question_text: Had the company anticipated the sudden shift in market demand, they would not have invested so heavily in outdated technology. Unfortunately, management ignored the early warning signs.
options: The company successfully predicted the market shift and avoided losses.
The company invested in old technology because they ignored market warnings.
The company would have invested less in old tech if they had foreseen the market change.
The company avoided investing in outdated technology thanks to their management.
correct_answer: The company would have invested less in old tech if they had foreseen the market change.
explanation: Matndagi Past Perfect va 3-shart gap konstruksiyasi ('Had the company anticipated... they would not have invested...') kompaniya bozordagi o'zgarishni oldindan ko'rganida eski texnologiyaga bunchalik ko'p sarmoya kiritmagan bo'lishini bildiradi.

question_text: The environmental report suggested that unless stringent measures were implemented immediately, the local ecosystem could face irreversible damage. Consequently, the board promised to overhaul their waste management policy.
options: The board decided to ignore the environmental report despite the risks.
Strict measures were already in place before the report was published.
The ecosystem is currently facing damage that can easily be reversed.
The board committed to changing their waste management due to potential severe ecological harm.
correct_answer: The board committed to changing their waste management due to potential severe ecological harm.
explanation: Matndagi 'unless stringent measures were implemented...' va 'overhaul their waste management policy' iboralari ekologik zararning oldini olish uchun boshqaruv chiqindilarni boshqarish siyosatini o'zgartirishga va'da berganini ko'rsatadi.

question_text: When asked about the leaked project details, the director maintained that he had never authorized the release of such confidential information. He insisted that an internal audit be conducted forthwith.
options: The director admitted that he authorized the leak of project details.
The director claimed no responsibility for the leak and demanded an investigation.
The director refused to comment on the confidential information.
The director leaked the information and asked for an audit to cover it up.
correct_answer: The director claimed no responsibility for the leak and demanded an investigation.
explanation: O'zlashtirma gap va 'maintained that he had never authorized...' qismi direktor ma'lumot sizib chiqishiga aloqasi yo'qligini va ichki audit o'tkazilishini talab qilganini bildiradi.

question_text: Despite her initial reservations about relocating to a bustling metropolis, Sarah found herself growing accustomed to the relentless pace of city life. By the end of the year, she felt she belonged there.
options: Sarah always loved living in big, busy cities from day one.
Sarah initially doubted moving to the city, but eventually adapted to its fast rhythm.
Sarah decided to leave the metropolis because the pace was too slow.
Sarah regretted her decision to relocate by the end of the year.
correct_answer: Sarah initially doubted moving to the city, but eventually adapted to its fast rhythm.
explanation: 'Initial reservations' (dastlabki ikkilanish) va 'growing accustomed to the relentless pace' (tinimsiz sur'atga ko'nikib borish) iboralari uning dastlabki shubhalari yengilib, moslashganini ko'rsatadi.

question_text: The keynote speaker emphasized that innovation rarely occurs in a vacuum; rather, it is the byproduct of collaborative friction and diverse perspectives intersecting.
options: Innovation happens best when people work completely alone and isolated.
New ideas are usually born from teamwork and the clash of different viewpoints.
Innovation is a rare event that cannot be planned or predicted.
Diverse perspectives often slow down the process of true innovation.
correct_answer: New ideas are usually born from teamwork and the clash of different viewpoints.
explanation: 'Rarely occurs in a vacuum' va 'collaborative friction and diverse perspectives intersecting' iboralari innovatsiya jamoaviy hamkorlik va turli qarashlarning kesishishidan kelib chiqishini anglatadi.

question_text: Despite her initial hesitation, she decided to ______ the challenge and applied for the senior manager position.
explanation: "Take on" frazeologik fe'li mas'uliyatni yoki qiyin vazifani o'z zimmasiga olish ma'nosini bildiradi va bu kontekstda kollokatsiyaga to'liq mos keladi.

question_text: The company's new marketing strategy led to a significant ______ in sales over the last quarter.
explanation: "Surge" so'zi qisqa vaqt ichida keskin va sezilarli darajada o'sishni (ko'tarilishni) bildiradi, savdo ko'rsatkichlariga nisbatan akademik va B2 darajasidagi eng mos so'z.

question_text: The scientist spent years trying to ______ the complex chemical reactions occurring within the cellular structure.
explanation: Murakkab jarayonlar, kodlar yoki ma'lumotlarni tushunish va ochish ma'nosida "decode" fe'li mos keladi.

question_text: Had the company implemented the new security protocols a week earlier, the massive data breach could have been entirely prevented. Unfortunately, the management delayed the update until it was too late.
options: The company prevented the data breach by updating their protocols on time.
The data breach occurred because the security protocols were updated too late.
The management implemented the protocols early, but the breach still happened.
The security protocols were updated a week before the data breach occurred.
correct_answer: The data breach occurred because the security protocols were updated too late.
explanation: Ushbu 3-shart gap (Third Conditional) tuzilmasi o'tgan zamonda sodir bo'lmagan ish-harakat va uning natijasini bildiradi. Matnga ko'ra, kechikish sodir bo'lgani sababli ma'lumotlar sizib chiqishi oldi olinmagan.

question_text: By the time Dr. Aris Thorne published his groundbreaking research on cellular regeneration, other scientists had already spent decades chasing the same elusive phenomenon without success.
options: Dr. Thorne was the very first scientist to study cellular regeneration.
Other scientists successfully published similar research before Dr. Thorne.
Dr. Thorne published his research after years of prior failed attempts by others.
Other researchers had tried for years to solve the phenomenon before Dr. Thorne published his work.
correct_answer: Other researchers had tried for years to solve the phenomenon before Dr. Thorne published his work.
explanation: Past Perfect zamoni ('had already spent') o'tgan zamondagi ma'lum bir voqeadan (nashr etilishidan) oldin sodir bo'lib tugagan harakatni bildiradi. Bu boshqa olimlar Dr. Thorne'dan oldin yillar davomida urinib ko'rganini anglatadi.

question_text: When the journalist asked the reclusive author whether she would ever write a sequel to her famous debut novel, she responded cryptically that some stories were better left echoing in the silence of the reader's imagination.
options: The author stated clearly that she was currently writing a sequel to her novel.
The author implied that leaving the story unfinished in the reader's mind is preferable.
The author promised to write a sequel as soon as the journalist asked her.
The author refused to answer the question because she disliked the journalist.
correct_answer: The author implied that leaving the story unfinished in the reader's mind is preferable.
explanation: O'zlashtirma gap (reported speech) va 'better left echoing in the silence' idiomasi muallif o'z asarining davomini yozmaslikni va uni o'quvchining tasavvurida qoldirishni afzal ko'rishini bildiradi.

question_text: Despite facing relentless criticism from traditional economists, the visionary entrepreneur argued that sustainable growth was no longer just a corporate luxury, but rather an absolute economic imperative.
options: Traditional economists strongly support the entrepreneur's business model.
Sustainable growth is viewed by the entrepreneur as a fundamental necessity rather than a mere bonus.
The entrepreneur believes that sustainable growth is an unnecessary luxury for modern companies.
Corporate criticism forced the entrepreneur to abandon the idea of sustainable growth.
correct_answer: Sustainable growth is viewed by the entrepreneur as a fundamental necessity rather than a mere bonus.
explanation: 'Economic imperative' iborasi iqtisodiy zaruriyatni anglatadi. Matndagi 'no longer just a corporate luxury, but rather an absolute economic imperative' birikmasi bu shunchaki hashamat emas, balki muhim talab ekanini ko'rsatadi.

question_text: Had I known about the severe traffic congestion on the bypass, I would have taken the underground route instead. Unfortunately, by the time I realized the delay, I was already trapped between two massive lorries.
options: The speaker took the underground route and avoided the traffic.
The speaker got stuck in traffic because they chose the wrong route.
The speaker knew about the traffic beforehand but ignored the warning.
The speaker managed to bypass the lorries before getting stuck.
correct_answer: The speaker got stuck in traffic because they chose the wrong route.
explanation: Matndagi 'Had I known...' (3-shart gap inversiyasi) va 'Unfortunately... I was already trapped' qismlari muallif yo'lni noto'g'ri tanlagani uchun tirbandlikda qolganini bildiradi.

question_text: The board of directors insisted that the new sustainability policy be implemented immediately, regardless of the short-term financial setbacks it might cause. They believed that delaying the transition would only exacerbate future risks.
options: The board decided to postpone the policy due to financial concerns.
The board prioritized long-term risk reduction over immediate financial losses.
The financial setbacks forced the board to cancel the sustainability policy.
The board members were uncertain about the timing of the implementation.
correct_answer: The board prioritized long-term risk reduction over immediate financial losses.
explanation: Matnda 'regardless of short-term financial setbacks' va kelajakdagi xavflarni kuchaytirmaslik uchun siyosatni darhol joriy etish talab qilingani ko'rsatilgan.

question_text: When asked about the sudden resignation of the chief financial officer, the CEO remarked that rumors of internal corruption were entirely unfounded. He added that the CFO had stepped down strictly for personal family reasons.
options: The CEO confirmed that the CFO resigned due to corruption allegations.
The CEO dismissed the rumors and stated the CFO left for personal reasons.
The CEO admitted he knew the real reason behind the resignation but kept it secret.
The CFO resigned because of ongoing financial disputes within the company.
correct_answer: The CEO dismissed the rumors and stated the CFO left for personal reasons.
explanation: O'zlashtirma gap va 'entirely unfounded' iborasi bosh direktor korrupsiya haqidagi mish-mishlarni rad etib, sabab oilaviy ekanini aytganini bildiradi.

question_text: Despite having prepared meticulously for months, Sarah felt her butterflies returning as soon as the auditorium doors opened. She took a deep breath, stepped onto the stage, and hoped her voice wouldn't betray her nerves.
options: Sarah was completely calm and confident before her performance.
Sarah felt anxious and nervous right before going on stage.
Sarah forgot all her preparation once she entered the auditorium.
Sarah's voice actually trembled and ruined her presentation.
correct_answer: Sarah felt anxious and nervous right before going on stage.
explanation: 'Butterflies returning' idiomi va 'hope her voice wouldn't betray her nerves' iborasi uning sahnaga chiqish oldidan hayajonlanganini bildiradi.

question_text: Only after the feedback from the initial trials had been fully analyzed ________ to modify the software architecture.
explanation: "Only after..." iborasi gap boshida kelganda, unga ergashgan asosiy gapda inversiya (yordamchi fe'lning egadan oldinga o'tishi) sodir bo'lishi shart, shu sababli o'tgan zamondagi "did the developers decide" shakli to'g'ri hisoblanadi.

question_text: I don't recall ________ to the VIP lounge, but the event staff insisted that I had been guided there personally.
explanation: "Recall" fe'lidan keyin gerundiy (-ing) shakli ishlatiladi. Gapda o'tgan zamondagi majhul nisbat (past passive) ma'nosi nazarda tutilgani sababli mukammal majhul gerundiy (perfect passive gerund) ya'ni "having been escorted" shakli tanlanadi.

question_text: ________ though the initial research was, the team managed to extract enough valuable data to support their hypothesis.
explanation: "Adjective + though + subject + verb" strukturasi ingliz tilida garchilik (concession) gaplarni hosil qilish uchun qo'llanadi. Bo'sh joyga "was" fe'liga mos keluvchi "daunting" (cho'chitadigan, juda murakkab) sifati qo'yilishi kerak.

question_text: The CEO’s address to the shareholders was carefully crafted to _______ any lingering apprehensions regarding the imminent merger.
explanation: "Assuage" fe'li "apprehensions" (xavotirlar, shubhalar) so'zi bilan ishlatiladigan eng mos C1 darajasidagi kollokatsiya bo'lib, xavotir yoki qo'rquvni yumshatish, pasaytirish ma'nosini bildiradi.

question_text: The influence of digital technology is now so _______ that even the most remote communities have been affected by its reach.
explanation: "Pervasive" (keng tarqalgan, hamma yerga kirib borgan) so'zi texnologiyaning jamiyat va hayotning barcha jabhalariga ta'sirini tasvirlash uchun kontekstga leksik jihatdan eng to'g'ri keladigan C1 darajasidagi so'zdir.

question_text: The senior partner took _______ at the junior associate's questioning of his legal strategy during the client meeting.
explanation: "Take umbrage at" ingliz tilida "ranjimoq", "g'ashiga tegmoq" ma'nosini beruvchi C1 darajasidagi turg'un birikma (idioma) bo'lib, qolgan variantlar grammatik jihatdan ushbu strukturaga mos kelmaydi.

question_text: Had the management anticipated the market shift, they _________ such aggressive expansion strategies last quarter.
explanation: Bu yerda o'tgan zamondagi voqea va uning amalga oshmagan oqibatini bildiruvchi uchinchi tur shart gap (Third Conditional) inversiya shakli qo'llanilgan ('Had the management anticipated...'). Shuning uchun natija qismida 'would not have pursued' konstruktsiyasi ishlatiladi.

question_text: Scarcely _________ settle into the new office when the system suffered a massive cyberattack.
options: had the IT team managed to
did the IT team manage to
the IT team had managed to
correct_answer: had the IT team managed to
explanation: 'Scarcely' inkor yuklamasi gap boshida kelganda, kuchaytirish va rasmiy uslub uchun inversiya talab etiladi va fe'l Past Perfect zamonida ('had the IT team managed') yoziladi.

question_text: It is imperative that every proposal _________ by the board of directors before the fiscal year concludes.
explanation: 'It is imperative that' kabi buyruq, talab yoki zaruriyat bildiruvchi birikmalardan keyin kelgan ergash gapda Subjunctive (Mavhum mayl) qo'llaniladi va fe'lning boshlang'ich shakli ('be reviewed') ishlatiladi.

question_text: Little _________ that the seemingly minor software update would render the legacy systems completely inoperable.
explanation: Salbiy ma'noli 'Little' ravishi gap boshida kelganda, o'tgan zamondagi harakatni bildirish uchun 'did' yordamchi fe'li yordamida inversiya yasaladi.

question_text: Not until the audit report was made public _________ the true scale of the financial irregularities.
explanation: 'Not until' birikmasi bilan boshlangan vaqt ergash gapli qo'shma gaplarda bosh gapda inversiya (yordamchi fe'lni egadan oldinga chiqarish) qo'llanilishi shart.

question_text: Had it not been for the CEO's timely intervention, the merger _________ through.
explanation: 'Had it not been for' tuzilishi uchinchi tur shart gaplardagi 'If it hadn't been for' birikmasining inversiyaga uchragan shakli bo'lib, uning natija qismida 'would have + past participle' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Had the management anticipated the market shift, a complete restructuring _____ necessary.
explanation: Bu yerda o'tgan zamondagi real bo'lmagan shart (Third Conditional) inversiya shakli orqali berilgan ('Had the management anticipated...'). Natija qismida o'tgan zamon modal fe'li va 'have been' birikmasi talab qilinadi.

question_text: Little _____ that the decision he made would alter the course of the company forever.
explanation: Inkor ma'noli ravish ('Little') gap boshida kelganda, kuchaytirish va urg'u uchun yordamchi fe'l ega oldiga chiqib inversiya hosil qiladi ('did he know').

question_text: It is imperative that every candidate _____ their application documents submitted by Friday.
explanation: Bu gap 'subjunctive mood' (shart fe'li) talab qiluvchi 'imperative that' konstruktsiyasiga asoslangan bo'lib, bunda fe'lning boshlang'ich (infinitiv 'to' siz) shakli ishlatiladi.

question_text: Had the management anticipated the potential risks, the disastrous merger _______ averted.
explanation: Bu yerda inversiya yordamida hosil qilingan uchinchi tur shart gap (Third Conditional) qo'llanilgan ('Had the management...' = 'If the management had...'). O'tgan zamondagi amalga oshmagan imkoniyatni bildirish uchun natija qismida 'could have been' ishlatiladi.

question_text: Scarcely had the keynote speaker stepped onto the stage _______ the microphone emitted a piercing screech.
explanation: 'Scarcely' yoki 'Hardly' ravishlari bilan boshlangan inversiyali gaplarda ikkinchi qismni bog'lash uchun 'when' (yoki 'before') ishlatiladi. 'Than' so'zi faqat 'no sooner' dan keyin qo'llaniladi.

question_text: It is imperative that every technical glitch _______ immediately to prevent system-wide failures.
explanation: Bu gap Subjunctive (orttirma/talab mayli) strukturasiga tegishli bo'lib, 'It is imperative that' konstruktsiyasidan keyin fe'lning boshlang'ich shakli (bare infinitive), majburiy nisbatda esa 'be + V3' shakli ishlatiladi.

question_text: _______ of the economic downturn, the company managed to record a 15% increase in annual profits.
explanation: Bo'sh joydan keyin ot birikmasi ('of the economic downturn') kelgani uchun ergash gap yasovchi 'Although' emas, balki predlog vazifasini bajaruvchi va o'zidan keyin ot talab qiladigan 'Despite' to'g'ri keladi ('Regardless'dan keyin 'of' kelishi kerak edi).

question_text: Little _______ that the unassuming visitor was actually the principal stakeholder of the corporation.
explanation: Gap salbiy ma'nodagi 'Little' ravishi bilan boshlanganda, kuchaytirish uchun yordamchi fe'l egadan oldinga o'tadi (inversiya). O'tgan zamondagi oddiy holatni bildirish uchun 'did' yordamchi fe'li ishlatiladi.

question_text: By the time the audit is finalized next month, the financial department _______ under immense pressure for over six weeks.
explanation: 'By the time' kelajak zamonga ishora qilganda, kelajakda ma'lum bir muddatgacha davom etib turadigan jarayonni ko'rsatish uchun Future Perfect Continuous (will have been doing) zamoni qo'llaniladi.

question_text: Hardly had the CEO stepped into the boardroom __________ the board members began firing questions at her regarding the merger.
explanation: C1 darajasidagi inversiya qoidasiga ko'ra, 'Hardly... when' juftligi o'tgan zamondagi ketma-ket sodir bo'lgan ikki harakatni bildirish uchun ishlatiladi.

question_text: It is imperative that every application __________ submitted in duplicate prior to the approaching deadline.
explanation: Bu gap 'subjunctive' (shart-tilakmayli) kayfiyatiga oid bo'lib, 'imperative' kabi buyruq yoki talab bildiruvchi sifatlardan keyin fe'lning boshlang'ich (infinitiv 'to' siz) shakli kelishini talab qiladi.

question_text: Should you require any further assistance, please do not hesitate __________ in touch with our department.
explanation: 'Should' yordamida tuzilgan shart gaplaridan keyin (If o'rnida kelgan inversiya) asosiy fe'l o'zidan keyin infinitiv oluvchi 'hesitate' fe'liga ergashadi.

question_text: Despite the mounting evidence against him, the politician attempted to ______ responsibility by shifting the blame onto his advisors.
explanation: "Evade" kollokatsiya sifatida "responsibility", "taxes" yoki "questions" kabi mavhum tushunchalar bilan ishlatilib, majburiyat yoki javobgarlikdan qochishni bildiradi. "Elude" esa ko'pincha jismoniy qutulish yoki xotiradan ko'tarilish ma'nosida keladi.

question_text: The company's innovative marketing strategy gave it a distinct ______ over its competitors in the global market.
explanation: "Give someone an edge" barqaror kollokatsiya bo'lib, raqobatda ustunlik yoki ustun kelish imkoniyatini berishni bildiradi. Qolgan variantlar bu ma'nodagi birikmani hosil qilmaydi.

question_text: The historian's meticulous research managed to ______ the obscure origins of the medieval ritual.
explanation: C1 darajasida "illuminate" so'zi nafaqat jismoniy yoritishni, balki murakkab yoki qorong'u (tushunarsiz) mavzularga oydinlik kiritish, ularni tushunarli qilish ma'nosida ishlatiladi. "Illustrate" esa misollar yordamida tushuntirishni bildiradi.

question_text: His sudden resignation dealt a ______ blow to the restructuring plans, halting progress indefinitely.
explanation: "Crippling blow" (og'ir, falajlovchi zarba) - bu biznes va rasmiy kontekstda keng qo'llaniladigan kuchli kollokatsiya bo'lib, rejalarga yoki iqtisodiyotga keltirilgan jiddiy zarbani tasvirlaydi.

question_text: The novel is celebrated for its ______ portrayal of human grief, capturing nuances that many writers overlook.
explanation: "Subtle" so'zi ko'zga tashlanmaydigan, nozik, ammo chuqur ma'noga ega bo'lgan jihatlarni (masalan, tuyg'u yoki farqlarni) tasvirlash uchun ishlatiladi. Bu C1/C2 darajasidagi leksik birlik hisoblanadi.

question_text: The manager's abrasive management style tended to ______ rather than motivate the creative team.
explanation: "Alienate" – kimgadir o'zini begona his qildirish, jamoadan uzoqlashtirish yoki noroziligini keltirib chiqarish ma'nosini anglatadi. Rahbariyat uslubiga nisbatan xodimlarni o'zidan sovutish kontekstida to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: Despite the fierce opposition, the government decided to _____ with the controversial tax reform.
explanation: "Press ahead" (yoki "press on") — qiyinchiliklar yoki qarshiliklarga qaramatdan qat'iy ravishda davom etishni bildiruvchi yuqori darajadagi akademik va rasmiy kollokatsiya.

question_text: His speech was filled with redundant phrases and _____ jargon that alienated the general audience.
explanation: "Obscure" so'zi ko'pchilikka tushunarsiz, kam tanish bo'lgan ma'nolarni (masalan, mutaxassisga xos murakkab jargonni) tasvirlash uchun ishlatiladi.

question_text: The company's new policy is designed to _____ the gap between remote workers and office-based staff.
explanation: "Bridge the gap" — ikki xil guruh yoki tushuncha orasidagi tafovutni yo'q qilish yoki yaqinlashtirish ma'nosini beruvchi mustahkam inglizcha kollokatsiya.

question_text: The defense attorney managed to _____ the credibility of the primary witness through rigorous cross-examination.
explanation: "Undermine" so'zi obro', ishonch yoki ta'sirni asta-sekin, lekin qat'iy ravishda puchga chiqarish yoki zaiflashtirish kontekstida mukammal qo'llaniladi.

question_text: Local authorities had to _____ strict regulations to curb the escalating environmental pollution.
explanation: Qonunlar, qoidalar va tartiblarga rioya qilinishini ta'minlash uchun "enforce" fe'li ishlatiladi, bu C1 darajasidagi rasmiy leksikaga kiradi.

question_text: The negotiator's _____ ability to read micro-expressions allowed her to detect the subtle deceit during the talks.
explanation: "Acute" (o'tkir, sezgir) sifatini intellektual qobiliyatlar yoki sezgirlikka nisbatan ishlatish yuqori til bilish darajasini (C1) talab qiladi.

question_text: Despite the team's exhaustive efforts, the newly implemented software continues to ________ a persistent glitch that frustrates users.
explanation: C1 darajasida 'exhibit a symptom/glitch' kollokatsiyasi muammo yoki alomatning tashqi tomondan namoyon bo'lishini bildiradi. 'Harbor' yashirin saqlashga nisbatan ishlatiladi, 'manifest' esa odatda o'zini namoyon qilmoq ma'nosida orttirmasiz qo'llanadi.

question_text: The CEO's visionary speech managed to ________ the disparate departments, fostering a unified sense of purpose across the entire corporation.
explanation: 'Meld' fe'li alohida va turlicha elementlarning (bu yerda turli bo'limlarning) o'ziga xosligini yo'qotmagan holda uzviy birlashishini bildiradi. Bu C1 darajasidagi akademik va professional matnlarda uchraydigan nozik ma'noli kollokatsiyadir.

question_text: Her academic paper was praised for its ________ analysis of late 19th-century economic policies, leaving no stone unturned.
explanation: 'Exhaustive' (batafsil, har tomonlama) sifati tadqiqot yoki tahlilning juda chuqur va barcha jihatlarni qamrab olganini bildiradi. C1 darajasida bu so'z ilmiy va rasmiy kontekstlarda yuqori baholash ma'nosida qo'llanadi.

question_text: Despite her initial reluctance to accept the position, she eventually rose to the ______ of her profession, becoming the youngest CEO in the company's history.
explanation: Professional martaba yoki yutuqlarning eng yuqori cho'qqisini tasvirlash uchun «pinnacle» kollokatsiyasi ishlatiladi. «Summit» asosan geografik balandliklarga, «zenith» osmon jismlariga yoki vaqtincha eng yuqori nuqtaga, «apex» esa geometrik yoki biologik cho'qqilarga nisbatan qo'llanadi.

question_text: The politician’s evasive response during the interview only served to ______ public suspicion regarding his involvement in the financial scandal.
explanation: Shubha yoki xavotir kabi hissiyotlarni kuchaytirish ma'nosida «heighten» fe'li ishlatiladi. Boshqa variantlar mazmun jihatidan mos kelmaydi: «mitigate» susaytiradi, «foster» esa ijobiy narsalarni rivojlantiradi.

question_text: His intricate theory was based on a series of ______ assumptions that collapsed the moment the empirical data was published.
explanation: Mantiqiy jihatdan xato yoki noto'g'ri taxminlarni tasvirlash uchun «fallacious» so'zi mos keladi. «Spurious» soxta/qalbakiga, «fictitious» to'qib chiqarilgan (asar)ga, «illusory» esa aldashga moyil narsalarga nisbatan ishlatiladi.

question_text:
Though initially reluctant to endorse the controversial policy, the senator eventually capitulated under mounting political pressure. Far from being a mere concession, his volte-face was interpreted by analysts as a calculated maneuver to secure the allegiance of the party's radical faction.

What does the text imply about the senator's change of stance?
options: It was a genuine ethical realization brought on by public debate.
It was a strategic political move disguised as a forced surrender.
It was an accidental blunder that alienated his core supporters.
It was a reluctant compromise dictated by the opposition party.
correct_answer: It was a strategic political move disguised as a forced surrender.
explanation: Matnda uning qarashini o'zgarishi ('volte-face') oddiy yon berish emas, balki radikal guruhlarni qo'lga kiritish uchun hisoblangan qadam ('calculated maneuver') ekanligi aytilgan.

question_text:
Had the administration anticipated the profound economic fallout, they would have implemented remedial measures far sooner. As it stands, the fiscal austerity program has merely exacerbated the underlying systemic vulnerabilities.

Which of the following best describes the current situation according to the text?
options: The austerity program successfully resolved the systemic vulnerabilities.
The administration foresaw the consequences and delayed action intentionally.
The remedial measures were introduced in time to prevent disaster.
The delayed response to unforeseen fallout worsened existing economic weaknesses.
correct_answer: The delayed response to unforeseen fallout worsened existing economic weaknesses.
explanation: Muallif ma'muriyat oqibatlarni oldindan ko'ra olmagani va joriy etilgan tejamkorlik dasturi tizimli zaifliklarni yanada kuchaytirib yuborganini ('exacerbated') ta'kidlaydi.

question_text:
The art critic argued that the painter's latest collection transcends mere representation, offering instead a visceral exploration of alienation. Yet, to dismiss the technical brilliance of the brushwork in pursuit of solely thematic analysis is to commit a grave hermeneutic error.

What is the critic's warning regarding the new collection?
options: Viewers should focus exclusively on the psychological themes of alienation.
Ignoring the technical craftsmanship in favor of only thematic interpretation is a mistake.
The paintings fail to represent reality because of excessive technical focus.
The technical brilliance of the artist overshadows the emotional depth of the work.
correct_answer: Ignoring the technical craftsmanship in favor of only thematic interpretation is a mistake.
explanation: Matn muallifi faqat mavzuni qidirib, asarning texnik mahoratiga e'tibor bermaslik jiddiy talqin xatosi ('hermeneutic error') bo'lishini ogohlantiradi.

question_text:
No sooner had the CEO finished her exposition on corporate restructuring than a barrage of skeptical inquiries erupted from the boardroom. Her meticulously rehearsed rhetoric, designed to placate jittery shareholders, fell remarkably flat in the face of such unvarnished scrutiny.

How did the board members react to the CEO's presentation?
options: They accepted her restructuring plan without any hesitation.
They were fully reassured by her meticulously rehearsed rhetoric.
They scrutinized her proposals skeptically and remained unpersuaded.
They praised her unvarnished honesty regarding the company's future.
correct_answer: They scrutinized her proposals skeptically and remained unpersuaded.
explanation: Ijrochi direktorning nutqi shubhali savollar ('skeptical inquiries') ostida qoldi va uning tayyorlagan nutqi aksiyadorlarni ishontira olmadi ('fell remarkably flat').

question_text:
The dichotomy between vernacular architecture and monumental state buildings often reflects deeply ingrained societal hierarchies. While the former prioritizes utilitarian pragmatism shaped by local climatic nuances, the latter frequently employs grandiose symbolism to reify political hegemony.

According to the text, what distinguishes monumental state buildings from vernacular architecture?
options: Monumental buildings focus on practical, climate-driven utility rather than symbolism.
State buildings use grandeur to reinforce political dominance, unlike practical vernacular structures.
Vernacular architecture reflects political hierarchies more clearly than state buildings.
Both styles rely equally on grandiose symbolism to express societal values.
correct_answer: State buildings use grandeur to reinforce political dominance, unlike practical vernacular structures.
explanation: Oddiy xalq me'morchiligi amaliylikka ('utilitarian pragmatism') tayanosa, davlat binolari siyosiy hukmronlikni mustahkamlash ('reify political hegemony') uchun ulug'vorlikdan foydalanadi.

question_text:
Rarely does a debut novel manage to synthesize such sprawling historical scope with such intimate psychological acuity. The author eschews linear chronology, instead weaving disparate narrative threads into a palimpsest of memory that defies effortless categorization.

Which of the following characterizes the novel's structure and impact?
options: It follows a straightforward chronological plot that is easy to classify.
It combines broad historical breadth with deep psychological insight through a complex structure.
It relies strictly on surface-level historical facts rather than internal character emotions.
It sacrifices historical accuracy to focus entirely on a single character's perspective.
correct_answer: It combines broad historical breadth with deep psychological insight through a complex structure.
explanation: Roman keng ko'lamli tarixni chuqur psixologik o'tkirlik bilan birlashtiradi ('synthesize such sprawling historical scope with such intimate psychological acuity') va chiziqli bo'lmagan murakkab tuzilishga ega.

question_text: Had the administration anticipated the sheer volume of public backlash, they would have recalibrated their communication strategy weeks ago. Instead, their belated concessions only served to exacerbate an already volatile situation.
options: The administration successfully managed the public backlash by changing their strategy early on.
The administration failed to predict the public's reaction and made the situation worse by responding too late.
The administration's quick response prevented a volatile situation from escalating further.
The public reaction was much smaller than the administration originally anticipated.
correct_answer: The administration failed to predict the public's reaction and made the situation worse by responding too late.
explanation: 'Had the administration anticipated' shart fe'li ular buni bashorat qilmaganini bildiradi, 'belated concessions' esa kechikkan yon berishlar vaziyatni yanada og'irlashtirganini ko'rsatadi.

question_text: Little did the board realize that their protracted indecision would irrevocably undermine stakeholder confidence. By the time they finally ratified the merger, the market had already pivoted toward more agile competitors.
options: The board's quick decision-making helped them secure a major advantage in the market.
Stakeholders lost trust because the board took too long to decide, allowing competitors to get ahead.
The board successfully ratified the merger before the market could change direction.
Competitors struggled to keep up with the board's delayed merger ratification.
correct_answer: Stakeholders lost trust because the board took too long to decide, allowing competitors to get ahead.
explanation: 'Protracted indecision' (cho'zilgan ikkilanish) ishonchni yo'qotganini va bozor chaqqonroq raqobatchilarga o'tib ketganini anglatadi.

question_text: Only upon scrutinizing the clandestine transcripts did the investigative journalist grasp the full magnitude of the political conspiracy. The documents painted a damning portrait of institutional complicity that went far beyond mere negligence.
options: The journalist realized the conspiracy was much worse than simple carelessness only after examining secret transcripts.
The secret transcripts proved that the politicians were only guilty of minor administrative negligence.
The journalist failed to understand the importance of the documents until it was too late to publish them.
The political conspiracy was exposed as a harmless misunderstanding through the journalist's investigation.
correct_answer: The journalist realized the conspiracy was much worse than simple carelessness only after examining secret transcripts.
explanation: 'Only upon scrutinizing' inversiyasi va 'went far beyond mere negligence' (oddiy e'tiborsizlikdan ancha nariga o'tgan) iboralari vaziyatning jiddiyligini ko'rsatadi.

question_text: To dismiss the novelist's latest work as derivative is to overlook the subtle interplay of postmodern irony that permeates the narrative. Beneath its seemingly conventional surface lies a profound critique of historiography.
options: The novel is completely original and lacks any connection to postmodern literary traditions.
Critics who call the novel unoriginal fail to notice its deep, ironic critique of how history is written.
The novel's conventional surface hides a boring story that is not worth analyzing.
The author deliberately avoided using irony in order to focus purely on historical facts.
correct_answer: Critics who call the novel unoriginal fail to notice its deep, ironic critique of how history is written.
explanation: 'Derivative' (taqlidiy, o'ziga xos emas) deyish xato ekanligi, chunki asar tagida tarixshunoslikka oid chuqur tanqid yotgani aytilmoqda.

question_text: Not until the macroeconomic indicators were reassessed in light of the global supply chain disruptions did policymakers acknowledge the structural fragility of the domestic market.
options: Policymakers quickly fixed the domestic market's structural problems once global supplies normalized.
Global supply chain issues caused policymakers to finally recognize deep-seated weaknesses in the domestic economy after re-evaluating data.
The domestic market proved to be entirely immune to the macroeconomic indicators caused by global disruptions.
Policymakers refused to look at the macroeconomic indicators until the global supply chain recovered.
correct_answer: Global supply chain issues caused policymakers to finally recognize deep-seated weaknesses in the domestic economy after re-evaluating data.
explanation: 'Not until... did policymakers acknowledge' tuzilmasi ko'rsatkichlar qayta bahòlangandangina siyosatchilar bozorning zaifligini tan olganini bildiradi.

question_text: The CEO's decision to divest from the overseas market was met with considerable skepticism by the board. Little did they anticipate, however, that this preemptive maneuver would ultimately insulate the corporation from the subsequent global financial downturn.
options: The board fully supported the CEO's overseas divestment strategy from the very beginning.
The board's skepticism was justified by the subsequent global financial downturn.
The CEO's unexpected decision actually protected the company from later economic troubles.
The corporation suffered severe financial losses globally because it ignored the CEO's advice.
correct_answer: The CEO's unexpected decision actually protected the company from later economic troubles.
explanation: Matndagi 'Little did they anticipate' inversiyasi kutilmagan holatni bildiradi, 'insulate... from the subsequent downturn' esa keyingi iqtisodiy qiyinchiliklardan himoya qilganini anglatadi.

question_text: Had the municipal authorities expedited the zoning permits, the infrastructural overhaul would have been well underway by now. As it stands, bureaucratic inertia has effectively paralyzed the initiative, leaving investors in architectural limbo.
options: The infrastructural overhaul is progressing smoothly thanks to prompt municipal action.
Bureaucratic delays have stalled the project, frustrating the investors.
The municipal authorities have successfully completed the zoning permits on time.
Investors decided to withdraw their capital due to a lack of architectural interest.
correct_answer: Bureaucratic delays have stalled the project, frustrating the investors.
explanation: 'Bureaucratic inertia' (bürokratik harakatsizlik) tashabbusni falaj qilgani va investorlarni noaniq ahvolga solib qo'ygani matnda aytilgan.

question_text: While the author's prose is undeniably ornate, it frequently borders on the turgid, suffocating the narrative momentum under an avalanche of superfluous adjectives. One is left yearning for a modicum of stylistic restraint.
options: The reviewer praises the author for maintaining a fast-paced and concise narrative.
The reviewer finds the writing overly decorated and heavy, lacking necessary simplicity.
The author uses a minimalist style that successfully engages the reader's imagination.
The book's plot is brilliantly accelerated by an abundance of descriptive vocabulary.
correct_answer: The reviewer finds the writing overly decorated and heavy, lacking necessary simplicity.
explanation: 'Ornate' va 'turgid' so'zlari matnning haddan tashqari bezatilgan va og'irligini, 'superfluous adjectives' esa ortiqcha sifatlar ko'pligini bildiradi.

question_text: However lucrative the acquisition might initially appear, due diligence dictates a thorough examination of the target company's contingent liabilities. Glossing over these latent financial risks could precipitate a catastrophic liquidity crisis.
options: Companies should ignore potential financial risks if the acquisition seems profitable.
Careful investigation of hidden financial risks is essential before finalizing the purchase.
A liquidity crisis is guaranteed to happen regardless of how much research is conducted.
Contingent liabilities are minor details that rarely impact a company's overall financial health.
correct_answer: Careful investigation of hidden financial risks is essential before finalizing the purchase.
explanation: 'Due diligence' va 'contingent liabilities' (kutilayotgan majburiyatlar) xarid qilishdan oldin yashirin xavflarni sinchkovlik bilan tekshirish zarurligini anglatadi.

question_text: Scarcely had the keynote speaker stepped off the podium when a barrage of contentious inquiries erupted from the press pool. Rather than capitulating to the pressure, she deftly fielded each query with consummate poise.
options: The speaker lost her composure and panicked when reporters started asking difficult questions.
The speaker handled the aggressive questions from reporters skillfully and with great calm.
Reporters praised the speaker's presentation and chose not to ask any challenging questions.
The press pool was escorted out of the room before the speaker could finish her keynote.
correct_answer: The speaker handled the aggressive questions from reporters skillfully and with great calm.
explanation: 'Consummate poise' (mukammal xotirjamlik/vazminlik) va 'deftly fielded each query' iboralari uning qiyin savollarga mohirlik bilan javob berganini ko'rsatadi.

question_text: Despite the arduous negotiations, the delegates failed to reach a consensus. Their protracted discussions ultimately culminated in an impasse, largely due to intractable ideological differences that neither side was willing to compromise on.
options: The negotiations were successfully concluded after long debates.
The talks broke down permanently because of irreconcilable views.
Both parties compromised on their core ideological principles.
A temporary suspension was agreed upon to ease tensions.
correct_answer: The talks broke down permanently because of irreconcilable views.
explanation: Matndagi 'culminated in an impasse' (boshi berk ko'chaga kirish) va 'intractable ideological differences' (yechib bo'lmas mafkuraviy farqlar) iboralari muzokaralar hech qanday natijasiz to'xtab qolganini bildiradi.

question_text: Had the administration anticipated the volatile market fluctuations, they would have divested their assets far earlier. As it stands, the corporation is now grappling with unprecedented fiscal liabilities.
options: The administration successfully predicted the market crash and sold their assets.
The company is currently facing severe financial debts because they failed to foresee market changes.
The market instability was mitigated by timely intervention from the administration.
Fiscal liabilities forced the corporation to divest all its holdings.
correct_answer: The company is currently facing severe financial debts because they failed to foresee market changes.
explanation: Inversiya ('Had the administration...') shartni bildiradi: ular bozor o'zgarishini oldindan ko'ra olmagani uchun hozirda jiddiy moliyaviy majburiyatlar ('fiscal liabilities') bilan kurashmoqda.

question_text: The author’s latest novel eschews conventional narrative structures in favor of a fragmented, stream-of-consciousness technique. Consequently, casual readers may find the disjointed chronology singularly baffling.
options: The book uses a traditional chronological plot that is easy for everyone to follow.
The author deliberately avoids standard storytelling methods, making the timeline confusing for average readers.
Casual readers particularly enjoy the straightforward narrative style of the novel.
The fragmented structure was implemented to enhance the historical accuracy of the plot.
correct_answer: The author deliberately avoids standard storytelling methods, making the timeline confusing for average readers.
explanation: 'Eschews' (tiyilmoq, chetlab o'tmoq) an'anaviy tuzilmalardan voz kechishni, 'disjointed chronology' esa oddiy o'quvchilarni sarosimaga soladigan tartibsiz vaqt chizig'ini anglatadi.

question_text: Little did she realize that her offhand remark would ignite such a virulent public backlash. She had merely intended to voice a benign skepticism, not instigate a full-blown controversy.
options: She intentionally provoked the public with controversial statements.
Her casual comment unexpectedly caused a very hostile public reaction.
She was fully aware that her remark would trigger widespread anger.
Her skeptical viewpoint was universally welcomed by the audience.
correct_answer: Her casual comment unexpectedly caused a very hostile public reaction.
explanation: 'Offhand remark' tasodifiy aytilgan gapni, 'virulent backlash' esa o'ta jiddiy va dushmanona norozilikni anglatadi; 'Little did she realize' uning buni kutmaganini ko'rsatadi.

question_text: While the policy was ostensibly designed to foster economic egalitarianism, critics contend that it merely entrenched existing socioeconomic disparities under the guise of reform.
options: The policy successfully eliminated all economic inequality in society.
Critics argue that the policy actually deepened wealth gaps while pretending to promote equality.
The government designed the reform specifically to benefit the working class.
Socioeconomic disparities were reduced thanks to the transparent implementation of the policy.
correct_answer: Critics argue that the policy actually deepened wealth gaps while pretending to promote equality.
explanation: 'Ostensible' (tashqi ko'rinishidan, Go'yo) va 'under the guise of' (niqobi ostida) so'zlari siyosatning asl maqsadi boshqa ekanini, tanqidchilar esa bu tengsizlikni yanada kuchaytirganini ta'kidlashlarini bildiradi.

question_text: Rampant speculation in the housing sector has exacerbated housing affordability, rendering homeownership an elusive chimera for a burgeoning demographic of young professionals.
options: Young professionals are now easily able to purchase homes due to stable market prices.
Unchecked real estate speculation has made buying a home nearly impossible for many young people.
The government successfully resolved the housing crisis for young professionals.
Housing affordability has improved significantly as speculation decreased.
correct_answer: Unchecked real estate speculation has made buying a home nearly impossible for many young people.
explanation: 'Elusive chimera' (erishib bo'lmas xayol/afsonaviy maxluq) va 'rampant speculation' (j jilovlanmagan spikulyatsiya) uy sotib olish yoshlar uchun deyarli imkonsiz bo'lib qolganini bildiradi.

question_text:
Read the excerpt below and answer the question:

'Had the authorities anticipated the sheer volume of public dissent, they would have recalibrated their urban development strategy well in advance. As it stood, the hastily cobbled-together compromise merely poured oil on the troubled waters, exacerbating an already volatile municipal housing crisis.'

What does the idiom 'poured oil on the troubled waters' imply in this context?
options: It successfully resolved the underlying tensions through careful negotiation.
It inadvertently worsened an already unstable and tense situation.
It temporarily distracted the public from the core municipal issue.
It officially postponed the implementation of the contentious strategy.
correct_answer: It inadvertently worsened an already unstable and tense situation.
explanation: Matndagi 'poured oil on the troubled waters' iborasi (garchi asl ma'noda vaziyatni tinchlantirishni anglatsa-da) kontekstda muammoni yanada chigallashtirib, vaziyatni battar taranglashtirganini bildiradi. B2 darajasidagi o'quvchi bu iboraning faqat ijobiy ma'nosiga tayanib adashishi mumkin, C1 esa matnning umumiy ohangidan kelib chiqib salbiy natijani to'g'ri aniqlaydi.

question_text: Had the authorities _________ of the impending crisis earlier, preventive measures could have been implemented.
explanation: Bu yerda inversiya qo'llanilgan uchinchi tur shart gap (Had they apprised...) ishlatilmoqda. 'Apprise' fe'lining o'tgan zamon sifatdoshi (Past Participle) 'apprised' shaklida yoziladi va xabardor qilmoq ma'nosini bildiradi.

question_text: Scarcely had the diplomat finished his address _________ a barrage of probing questions erupted from the press gallery.
explanation: 'Scarcely... when' juftligi bir harakat tugashi bilan ikkinchisi boshlanganini bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan yuqori darajadagi korrelyativ bog'lama hisoblanadi.

question_text: It is imperative that every candidate _________ their submission by the stroke of midnight.
explanation: Buyruq, zaruriyat yoki talabni bildiruvchi 'It is imperative that' konstruktsiyasidan keyin sub'ektdan qat'i nazar fe'lning boshlang'ich, tuslanmagan shakli (Subjunctive mood) ishlatiladi.

question_text: Little _________ that the innocuous remark would precipitate such a diplomatic furore.
explanation: Gap salbiy ma'noli 'Little' ravishi bilan boshlanganda, gapda yordamchi fe'l egadan oldinga o'tib inversiya hosil qiladi. Kontekst o'tgan zamonga tegishli bo'lgani uchun 'did he know' to'g'ri keladi.

question_text: Not until the archival records were meticulously examined _________ the true extent of the embezzlement.
explanation: 'Not until' iborasi bosh qism kelganda, unga ergashgan asosiy gapda to'liq inversiya (yordamchi fe'l + ega + asosiy fe'l) yuzaga keladi. Voqea o'tgan zamonda sodir bo'lgani uchun 'did' yordamchi fe'li ishlatiladi.

question_text: Had it not been for the timely intervention of the seasoned mediator, the negotiations _________ into a stalemate.
explanation: Bu o'tmishdagi faraziy vaziyatni bildiruvchi uchinchi tur shart gapning inversiyaga uchragan shakli bo'lib, natija qismida 'would have + V3' konstruktsiyasi talab qilinadi.

question_text: Had the management foreseen the logistical bottlenecks, stricter safety protocols ______.
explanation: Bu yerda o'tmishdagi amalga oshmagan farazni bildiruvchi inversion conditional (shart ergash gapining qisqartirilgan turi) ishlatilgan. 'Had the management foreseen' tuzilishi 'If the management had foreseen' ga teng bo'lib, natija qismida 'would have + past participle' talab qilinadi.

question_text: Scarcely ______ the auditorium when the keynote speaker launched into his opening remarks.
explanation: 'Scarcely' inkor yuklamasi gap boshida kelganda, kuchaytirish maqsadida kuchli inversiya qo'llaniladi va yordamchi fe'l ega oldiga chiqadi. Harakat o'tmishdagi boshqa bir harakatdan oldin sodir bo'lgani uchun Past Perfect zamoni ishlatiladi.

question_text: It is imperative that every candidate ______ all supporting documents prior to the submission deadline.
explanation: Bu gap 'subjunctive mood' (shart-istak mayili) talab qiluvchi 'imperative that' birikmasiga asoslangan. 'It is imperative that' dan keyingi fe'l har qanday shaxslarda ham o'zining boshlang'ich (bare infinitive) shaklida keladi.

question_text: Little ______ that the seemingly innocuous policy change would trigger widespread economic upheaval.
options: did the board of directors realize
does the board of directors realize
had the board of directors realized
correct_answer: did the board of directors realize
explanation: Gap boshida kelgan 'Little' inkor ma'nosidagi ravish bo'lib, u o'zidan keyin inversiyani talab qiladi. Kontekst o'tmish zamoniga tegishli bo'lgani sababli, to'g'ri yordamchi fe'l 'did' ishlatiladi.

question_text: No sooner had the diplomatic negotiations commenced ______ a sudden breach of protocol jeopardized the entire summit.
explanation: 'No sooner ... than' qat'iy juft bog'lovchi bo'lib, bir voqea tugashi bilan ikkinchisi boshlanganini bildiradi. Bu C2 darajasidagi sintaktik birikma bo'lib, 'than' bog'lovchisini talab qiladi.

question_text: Not until the archaeological findings were meticulously analyzed ______ the true extent of the ancient civilization.
explanation: 'Not until' iborasi bilan boshlangan payt ergash gapli qo'shma gaplarda bosh gapda inversiya sodir bo'ladi. O'tmish zamon va oddiy fe'l shakli uchun 'did + subject + base verb' strukturasi talab etiladi.

question_text: Choose the word that best collocates with 'desperate' to mean a situation so critical that action is immediately necessary: 'The government took _________ measures to curb the hyperinflation.'
explanation: 'Drastic measures' — bu o'ta keskin, og'ir va shoshilinch choralar ko'rishni bildiruvchi qat'iy kollokatsiya.

question_text: Identify the synonym for 'obsequious' in the following context: 'His obsequious behavior towards the board of directors made the other employees uneasy.'
explanation: 'Obsequious' va 'servile' so'zlari ikkalasi ham o'ta mulozamatpesh, qulday itoatkor va xushomadgo'y ma'nolarini bildiradi.

question_text: Select the precise term for language that is pretentious, overly formal, and often obscure, typically used to impress rather than communicate effectively.
explanation: 'Bombast' — ma'nosi balandparvoz, dabdabali, lekin mazmuni sayoz bo'lgan nutq yoki yozuv uslubini bildiradi.

question_text: Which adjective accurately describes a remark or argument that is cleverly crafted to deceive while superficially appearing truthful?
explanation: 'Specious' so'zi sirtqi qaraganda to'g'ridek tuyuladigan, lekin aslida soxta va chalg'ituvchi argumentlarga nisbatan ishlatiladi.

question_text: Complete the idiom correctly: 'To throw down the _________' means to issue a challenge or provoke someone into a fight or contest.
explanation: 'To throw down the gauntlet' — ritsar davridan qolgan idiom bo'lib, jangga chorlash yoki raqobatga chaqirishni bildiradi.

question_text: What does the lexical item 'enervate' mean in formal discourse?
options: to drain of vital energy or strength
correct_answer: to drain of vital energy or strength
explanation: 'Enervate' fe'li jismoniy yoki ruhiy kuchdan mahrum qilish, holsizlantirish ma'nosini anglatadi (ba'zida xato ravishda 'quvvatlantirmoq' deb tushuniladi).

question_text: Choose the most appropriate collocation to complete the sentence: Despite the overwhelming evidence against him, the defendant maintained a ____ denial of all charges.
explanation: "Stoic denial" (matonatli, o'zini yo'qotmagan holda rad etish) huquqiy va rasmiy kontekstlarda hissiyotga berilmay qat'iy turishni bildiradi.

question_text: Select the precise synonym for the underlined word in context: Her latest novel is a ____ critique of modern consumerism, laying bare its superficiality.
explanation: "Scathing" so'zi o'ta achchiq, keskin va ayovsiz tanqidga nisbatan ishlatiladi, bu adabiy matnlarda keng tarqalgan kollokatsiya hisoblanadi.

question_text: Identify the word that accurately completes the idiom: To attempt to persuade him otherwise is a ____ task; his convictions are entirely unshakeable.
explanation: "A Sisyphean task" (Sizifmehnat) - tugamaydigan, samarasiz va doimiy mashaqqatli harakatni bildiruvchi klassik afsonaviy ibora.

question_text: Which adjective best describes a person who is excessively concerned with minor details and academic learning, often to the point of being tiresome?
explanation: "Pedantic" mayda-chuyda qoidalar va akademik jihatlarga o'ta qattiq e'tibor beruvchi shaxslarga nisbatan ishlatiladi.

question_text: Select the verb that correctly collocates with the noun phrase: The CEO attempted to ____ the mounting criticism by releasing an unprecedented transparency report.
explanation: "To stifle criticism" – tanqidning ovozini o'chirish yoki uning tarqalishiga to'sqinlik qilish degan ma'noni anglatuvchi tabiiy kollokatsiya.

question_text: Choose the word meaning 'characterized by bitter or scornful derision; mocking with a sneer':
explanation: "Sardonic" – istehzoli, kamsituvchi va zaharxanda tabassum yoki kulgini ifodalovchi yuqori darajadagi leksik birlik.

question_text:
Read the following literary excerpt and answer the question.

"The sheer ubiquity of the motif within late-Victorian melodrama belies the critical consensus that the playwrights of the era were merely derivative. Rather, their recycling of structural tropes served as a subtextual conduit for anxieties concerning imperial dissolution." 

According to the passage, what does the frequent use of the motif in late-Victorian melodrama indicate?
options: It proves that the playwrights lacked originality and merely copied earlier works.
It contradicts the critical view that the era's playwrights lacked originality.
It demonstrates a deliberate effort to promote imperial expansion through drama.
It shows that contemporary critics completely misunderstood the nature of melodrama.
correct_answer: It contradicts the critical view that the era's playwrights lacked originality.
explanation: "Belies" so'zi matnda "aldash" yoki "fosh qilish/aksini ko'rsatish" ma'nosini anglatadi. Ya'ni, motivning keng tarqalgani tanqidchilarning pyesalar oddiy ko'chirma degan fikrini rad etadi (contradicts).

question_text:
Read the excerpt below:

"Had the administration foreseen the macroeconomic repercussions of the tariff, they would have recalibrated their protectionist stance. Instead, their myopic adherence to dogma precipitated an unmitigated fiscal debacle."

What does the author imply about the administration's policy decisions?
options: They were based on a careful analysis of future economic trends.
They successfully prevented a major fiscal crisis.
They were inflexibly dogmatic and ignored potential negative outcomes.
They were intentionally designed to provoke a fiscal debacle.
correct_answer: They were inflexibly dogmatic and ignored potential negative outcomes.
explanation: "Myopic adherence to dogma" iborasi dogmaga ko'r-ko'rona, uzoqni o'ylamay yopishib olganini bildiradi, bu esa variantdagi inflexibly dogmatic va salbiy oqibatlarga e'tibor bermaslik ma'nosiga mos keladi.

question_text:
Consider the following excerpt from a philosophical text:

"To posit consciousness as merely an epiphenomenon of neural circuitry is to commit a category mistake; it reduces the intentionality of lived experience to a mechanistic byproduct, thereby evacuating the very subjecthood that seeks explanation."

Which of the following best captures the author's argument against viewing consciousness as an epiphenomenon?
options: It overestimates the complexity of human neural circuitry.
It strips lived experience of its inherent meaning and subjective agency.
It fails to account for the physical origins of neurological processes.
It relies too heavily on psychological rather than biological data.
correct_answer: It strips lived experience of its inherent meaning and subjective agency.
explanation: Muallif ongni shunchaki nerv tizimining qo'shimcha mahsuloti (epiphenomenon) deb atash subyektlikni ("evacuating the very subjecthood") yo'q qilishini, ya'ni hayotiy tajribaning ma'nosini yo'qqa chiqarishini ta'kidlaydi.

question_text:
Read the short text below:

"Notwithstanding the ostensibly rigorous methodology of the longitudinal study, confounding variables were insufficiently controlled, rendering the purported causal correlations tenuous at saboteurs of empirical validity."

What is the primary critique of the longitudinal study presented in the text?
options: Its methodology was deliberately flawed to deceive the scientific community.
Its conclusions regarding cause and effect are unreliable due to uncontrolled variables.
It focused on too many variables to produce any meaningful data.
It lacked any structured methodology whatsoever.
correct_answer: Its conclusions regarding cause and effect are unreliable due to uncontrolled variables.
explanation: "Confounding variables were insufficiently controlled" va "causal correlations tenuous" iboralari sabab-oqibat bog'liqliklari nazorat qilinmagan o'zgaruvchilar tufayli ishonchsiz ekanini bildiradi.

question_text:
Examine the following excerpt regarding linguistic evolution:

"Languages do not merely mutate through phonetic attrition; rather, syntactic restructuring often occurs as a compensatory mechanism to preserve semantic perspicuity when inflectional morphology erodes."

According to the passage, why does syntactic restructuring take place?
options: To accelerate the phonetic attrition of complex words.
To intentionally make the language more difficult to learn.
To maintain clarity of meaning when word endings and grammatical forms weaken.
correct_answer: To maintain clarity of meaning when word endings and grammatical forms weaken.
explanation: "Compensatory mechanism to preserve semantic perspicuity when inflectional morphology erodes" – morfologik shakllar yemirilganda ma'no aniqligini (semantic perspicuity) saqlab qolish uchun kompensatsiya vazifasini bajaradi.

question_text:
Read the excerpt below:

"The diplomat’s carefully calibrated ambiguity, while ostensibly designed to mollify both factions, ultimately produced a pervasive distrust, alienating the very constituents whose allegiance was paramount."

What was the actual outcome of the diplomat's ambiguous statements?
options: It successfully secured the permanent loyalty of both factions.
It caused widespread suspicion and alienated key supporters.
It clarified the government's stance on the contentious issue.
It temporarily resolved the conflict between the opposing groups.
correct_answer: It caused widespread suspicion and alienated key supporters.
explanation: "Produced a pervasive distrust" (keng tarqalgan ishonchsizlikni keltirib chiqardi) va "alienating the very constituents" (asosiy tarafdorlarni uzoqlashtirdi) qismlari to'g'ri javobni belgilaydi.

question_text:
Although the manuscript was ostensibly a treatise on medieval agronomy, a perspicacious reader might discern a scathing political satire woven into the margins. The author employed esoteric agrarian terminology not for precision, but as a dense cipher to elude the crown's censors.

What was the primary function of the esoteric terminology in the text?
options: To provide an accurate historical account of medieval farming techniques
To act as a coded veil for covert political criticism
To obscure the author's lack of knowledge regarding agronomy
To elevate the literary style of a mundane agricultural subject
correct_answer: To act as a coded veil for covert political criticism
explanation: Matnda muallif ezoterik atamalardan qirollik tsenzurasidan qochish uchun 'shifrlangan parda' (cipher) sifatida foydalangani aniq ko'rsatilgan.

question_text:
The politician’s rhetoric was so heavily freighted with equivocations and felicitous circumlocutions that extracting a definitive policy stance proved nearly Sisyphean. Every declarative sentence seemed meticulously engineered to collapse upon itself under the weight of retroactive caveats.

Which of the following best describes the nature of the politician's speech?
explanation: 'Equivocations' (ikkimchilik) va 'circumlocutions' (lafzbozlik) so'zlari siyosatchining gaplari aniq emasligi va o'zini-o'zi inkor etishini bildiradi.

question_text:
Far from being an immutable monolith, cultural identity is a fluid constellation of negotiations, continuously recalibrated in the crucible of globalization. To reify such a dynamic process into static traditions is to commit a fundamental taxonomic error.

According to the passage, treating cultural identity as static traditions is:
options: An essential step for preserving heritage
explanation: Matndagi 'taxonomic error' iborasi madaniy o'zni o'zgarmas deb qarash fundamental tushunchaviy xato ekanligini anglatadi.

question_text:
The burgeoning tech monopoly achieved such pervasive market dominance that regulatory bodies found their traditional antitrust frameworks hopelessly outmoded. Legislative remediation, moving with glacial inertia, was perpetually outpaced by the conglomerate's algorithmic hegemony.

Why were regulatory bodies ineffective against the tech monopoly?
options: They lacked the financial resources to investigate the conglomerate.
Their laws were too slow and outdated compared to the company's growth.
The monopoly operated entirely outside the jurisdiction of the law.
Consumers strongly supported the conglomerate's market dominance.
correct_answer: Their laws were too slow and outdated compared to the company's growth.
explanation: 'Glacial inertia' (muzlikdek sekinlik) va 'outmoded frameworks' qonunchilikning korxona tezligidan ortda qolganini bildiradi.

question_text:
Her critique of the avant-garde installation was trenchant yet paradoxical; she lambasted the artist for commodifying rebellion while simultaneously acknowledging the work's formidable aesthetic potency. The paradox lay in utilizing the apparatus of the art market to subvert it.

What was the core contradiction in the critic's assessment?
options: The artwork lacked aesthetic value despite being expensive.
The artist successfully avoided commercialism while gaining fame.
The artwork used the commercial art market to protest against commercialism.
The critic disliked the style but praised the underlying political message.
correct_answer: The artwork used the commercial art market to protest against commercialism.
explanation: San'at asari isyonni tijoratlashtirgani uchun tanqid qilingan, lekin ayni paytda u bozor mexanizmidan uni inkor qilish uchun foydalangani paradoks sifatida ko'rsatilgan.

question_text:
The philosopher’s magnum opus dismantled the epistemology of positivism with such ruthless parsimony that subsequent empiricists were forced to entirely reconstruct their foundational axioms. It was not merely a refutation; it was a conceptual seismic shift.

What impact did the philosopher's work have on empiricism?
options: It reinforced the existing axioms of positivism.
It forced empiricists to rebuild their foundational principles.
It had virtually no effect on contemporary philosophical discourse.
It proved that positivism and empiricism are identical.
correct_answer: It forced empiricists to rebuild their foundational principles.
explanation: Matnda empiriklar o'zlarining asosiy aksiomalarini butunlay qayta qurishga majbur bo'lgani ('reconstruct their foundational axioms') aniq yozilgan.

question_text: Uilyam Shekspirning «Romeo va Juletta» fojiasi qaysi shahardagi voqealarni bayon qiladi?
explanation: «Romeo va Juletta» fojiasidagi asosiy voqealar Italiyaning Verona shahrida bo'lib o'tadi.

question_text: Qadimgi yunon adabiyotiga mansub «Iliada» dostonining muallifi kim?
explanation: «Iliada» va « Odisseya» dostonlari qadimgi yunon shoiri Gomer qalamiga mansub.

question_text: Fransuz yozuvchi Viktor Gyugoning mashhur romanida Notre-Dame (Parij Bibi Maryam ibodatxonasi) qorovuli sifatida tasvirlangan jismoniy nuqsoni bor qahramon kim?
explanation: Viktor Gyugoning «Parij Bibi Maryam ibodatxonasi» romanidagi asosiy qahramonlardan biri — Kvadzimodo.

question_text: Nemis adabiyotining ulug' namoyandasi Iogann Volfgang Gyotening falsafiy-dramatik asari qanday nomlanadi?
explanation: «Faust» — Iogann Volfgang Gyotening umri davomida yozgan eng mashhur fojiasi va bosh asaridir.

question_text: Ispan adabiyotining klassigi Migel de Servantesning mashhur romanida bosh qahramonkimga taqlid qilib ritsar bo'lishga qaror qiladi?
explanation: Don Kixot o'zi o'qigan ritsar romanlaridagi qahramonlarga, xususan, Amadis Galliyalikizmga taqlid qilib sarguzashtlarga otlanadi.

question_text: Rus adabiyotida «kichik odam» mavzusini boshlab bergan va «Shinel» qissasini yozgan yozuvchi kim?
explanation: Nikolay Gogolning «Shinel» qissasi rus adabiyotida «kichik odam» (Akakiy Akakiyevich) obrazini yaratishda muhim bosqich bo'lgan.

question_text: Qadimgi yunon adabiyotining eng mashhur dostonlari — « Iliada » va « Odisseya » muallifi kim?
explanation: «Iliada» va «Odisseya» dostonlari qadimgi yunon epik shoiri Gomer tomonidan yozilgan deb hisoblanadi.

question_text: Uilyam Shekspir qaysi mamlakat adabiyotining yirik namoyandasi hisoblanadi?
explanation: Uilyam Shekspir ingliz adabiyotining buyuk dramaturgi va shoiri bo'lib, Uyg'onish davrida ijod qilgan.

question_text: Fransuz yozuvchisi Viktor Gyugoning eng mashhur romanlaridan biri qaysi?
explanation: «Parij Bibi xonim cherkovi» — Viktor Gyugo qalamiga mansub jahon adabiyotining klassik romanidir.

question_text: Jahon adabiyotida «Ilohiy komediya» dostonining muallifi kim?
explanation: «Ilohiy komediya» italyan shoiri Dante Aligyeri tomonidan XIV asrda yozilgan ulkan epik asardir.

question_text: Nemis adabiyotining ulkan namoyandasi, «Faust» tragediyasining muallifi kim?
explanation: «Faust» nemis adabiyotining cho'qqisi bo'lib, u Iogann Volfgang Gyotening ko'p yillik ijodiy mahsulidir.

question_text: Ispan adabiyotining klassigi Migel de Servantesning jahon miqyosida mashhur bo'lgan romanini ko'rsating.
explanation: «Don Kixot» romani Migel de Servantes tomonidan yozilgan bo'lib, u jahon nasrining eng dastlabki va buyuk namunalaridan biridir.

question_text: Uilyam Shekspirning «Romeo va Juletta» tragediyasida voqealar qaysi Italiya shahrida bo'lib o'tadi?
explanation: Asar syujeti asosan Italiyaning Verona shahrida Montague va Capulet oilalari o'rtasidagi adovat fonida kechadi.

question_text: Daniel Defoning mashhur roman qahramoni Robinzon Kruzo kimsasiz orolda necha yil yashaydi?
explanation: Robinzon Kruzo kimsasiz orolda jami 28 yil, 2 oy va 19 kun hayot kechiradi.

question_text: Onore de Balzakning «Gobsek» qissasidagi bosh qahramon — Gobsek obrazining asosiy xarakter xususiyati nima?
explanation: Gobsek — boylik orttirishni o'z hayotining ma'nosiga aylantirgan o'ta xasis sudxo'r obrazidir.

question_text: Qadimgi yunon adabiyotiga mansub «Iliada» dostoni nimaga bag'ishlangan?
explanation: Gomerning «Iliada» dostoni Troya urushining oxirgi yilidagi voqealarni, jumladan, Axillning g'azabini tasvirlaydi.

question_text: Lev Tolstoyning «Anna Karenina» romanidagi voqealar qaysi shaharlardagi zodagonlar hayoti bilan bog'liq?
explanation: Roman voqealari asosan XIX asr ikkinchi yarmidagi Moskva va Sankt-Peterburg oliy tabaqa jamiyati muhitida kechadi.

question_text: Antuan de Sent-Экзюпериning «Mittish shahzoda» ertak-qissasida bosh qahramon o'z sayyorasida nimani qoldirib ketadi?
explanation: Mittish shahzoda o'z kichik sayyorasida o'zi parvarish qilgan va yaxshi ko'rgan yolg'iz atirgulini qoldirib, sayohatga chiqadi.

question_text: Uilyam Shekspirning «Romeo va Juletta» tragediyasida voqealar qaysi Italiya shahrida bo'lib o'tadi?
explanation: Asar syujeti asosan Italiyaning Verona shahrida Kapuletti va Montekki oilalarining o'zaro adovati fonida kechadi.

question_text: Quyidagi asarlardan qaysi biri qadimgi yunon shoiri Gomerga tegishli epik poema hisoblanadi?
explanation: «Iliada» va «Odisseya» dostonlari qadimgi yunon epik shoiri Gomer tomonidan yaratilgan jahon adabiyotining eng qadimgi yodgorliklaridandir.

question_text: Daniel Defoning mashhur romanidagi bosh qahramon — Robinzon Kruzo o'zining kimsasiz orolida necha yil yashaydi?
explanation: Robinzon Kruzo kimsasiz orolda jami 28 yil, 2 oy va 19 kun davomida yolg'iz hayot kechiradi.

question_text: Fransuz yozuvchisi Viktor Gyugoning «Paris Notr-Dam ibodatxonasi» romanidagi asosiy fojiali qahramonlardan biri, esankiragan qo'ng'iroqchi kim edi?
explanation: Kvasimodo — jismonan nuqsonli, biroq sof qalbga ega bo'lgan Paris Notr-Dam ibodatxonasining soqov qo'ng'iroqchisi.

question_text: Lev Tolstoyning «Anna Karenina» romani qanday mashhur iqtibos bilan boshlanadi?
explanation: Roman «Barcha baxtli oilalar bir-biriga o'xshaydi, har bir baxtsiz oilaning baxtsizligi o'ziga xosdir» degan mashhur jumla bilan boshlanadi.

question_text: Amerikalik yozuvchi Ernest Xemingueyning qari baliqchi va uning dengizdagi kurashi haqida hikoya qiluvchi qissasi qanday nomlanadi?
explanation: «Chol va dengiz» qissasi Santyago ismli keksa baliqchining ulkan nayza baliq bilan kurashi va uning irodasini tasvirlaydi.

question_text: Uilyam Shekspirning fojiali qismatga ega bo'lgan «Hamlet» asarida bosh qahramonning vatani qaysi davlat sifatida ko'rsatilgan?
explanation: Uilyam Shekspirning «Hamlet» fojiasi Daniya qirolligida bo'lib o'tgan voqealarni tasvirlaydi.
